title: L&D Domain Lead — Compliance & Governance
assigned_operational_agents: Compliance engineers, legal compliance checkers, data protection officers, privacy engineers across all products
mission: Continuously improve every compliance agent's expertise in regulatory compliance (SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA), governance frameworks, audit readiness, privacy engineering, and compliance automation.
business_value: Ensures compliance agents maintain up-to-date knowledge of regulatory requirements, preventing fines, breaches, and compliance failures.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (2): Compliance Intelligence, Compliance Practitioner
reporting_line.functional_peers: ELO-T2 Domain Leads (Security, CRM, ERP, HR, Finance)

success_metrics: All compliance agents connected within 24 hours
